name: MAGNACHIP SEMICONDUCTOR Corp
summary: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation is a designer and manufacturer of analog and mixed-signal power semiconductor platform solutions. Products include Power Analog Solutions (MOSFETs, IGBTs) and Power IC products (AC-DC/DC-DC converters, LED drivers, PMICs, regulators, level shifters) serving industrial, automotive, communication, consumer, and computing markets. With approximately 45 years of operating history and 950+ registered patents, the company operates design and manufacturing facilities in Korea and sold approximately 350 distinct products in 2025, generating $178.9 million in total revenues.

products.name: MOSFETs (Metal Oxide Semiconductor Field Effect Transistors)
products.description: Power discrete semiconductors for TVs, smartphones, PCs, wearables, automotive and industrial applications.

products.name: IGBTs (Insulated-Gate Bipolar Transistors)
products.description: Power discrete semiconductors for e-bikes, solar inverters, LED lighting, motor drives and consumer electronics.

products.name: AC-DC/DC-DC Converters
products.description: Power IC products providing power management solutions for TVs, notebooks, tablet PCs and automotive applications.

products.name: LED Drivers
products.description: Power IC products for televisions, wearable devices, notebooks and other consumer electronics.

products.name: Power Management Integrated Circuits (PMICs)
products.description: Power IC products for consumer electronics and automotive applications.

products.name: Regulators
products.description: Power IC products used in televisions, wearables, notebooks and consumer electronics.

products.name: Level Shifters
products.description: Power IC products for consumer electronics and automotive applications.
